name: adaptive-model-router
description: Routes bounded Codex task stages to an available model and reasoning effort, with local approval-gated learning.

interface.shortDescription: Delegate bounded stages to the right Codex model
interface.longDescription: Opt in once to route substantive stages automatically, choose an available model and reasoning effort for bounded subagents, preserve host-model intent, verify outcomes, and learn local project policy only after explicit approval.
defaultPrompt: Show the current route and delegated model target.
